rag_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to ports
Use `assign` in implementation annexes only for existing outputs or auxiliary variables
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Use `eq` for helper declarations and `const` for constants
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Use only valid identifiers from the visible scope in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
